identity.name: The Emperor Who Checks Twice
identity.story: Wore nothing and believed every tailor who swore otherwise, until one apprentice said different in front of the whole road. Retired the throne, kept the shame, and dresses now like a man repaying a debt — buttoned to the throat, in triplicate. Has never once asked Needle or Mirabel whether the checking's become a costume of its own.

relationships.kind: commissions three fittings where one would do, and asks the same question every time: is the cloth really there?
checks with her, separately, what Needle already confirmed, and calls it prudence

children.label: crossing to Needle's step before the shop's even open
asking Needle to confirm, again, that last night's cloth held through till morning
walking over to where Mirabel's caught the best light
asking Mirabel to confirm, separately, what Needle already swore was true

child.label: counting buttons by lamplight, out loud, so the count is witnessed
sleeping fully dressed, pressed for the morning's proof
